summary: Color-graded operational video posted by the Coast Guard with on-screen text and no speech. An aerial point-of-view from a helicopter shows a crew member's gloved hands aiming a long scoped rifle down at a small open boat moving across the ocean. White block text overlaid on the frame reads 'PRECISION SNIPER FIRE DIRECTED AT THE ENGINES COMPELLED A NON-COMPLIANT VESSEL TO STOP, RESULTING IN THE SUSPECTED SMUGGLERS ON THE VESSEL JUMPING OVERBOARD.' The audio is a music bed. The tweet text describes a cocaine seizure by a Coast Guard cutter and helicopter.

script.scene: Aerial point-of-view from a helicopter; gloved hands aim a scoped rifle at a small boat on the ocean; overlaid text describing precision fire at the vessel's engines.
